titleStmt.title: SII 26.349: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 349. (A.R. No. 330 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pugaḻśūḻnda puṇari, etc.

It records a gift of land in Kūvam alias Madhurāntakanallūr in Kanṟūrnāḍu in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, by the mahā-sabhai of the place, purchased from money in gold received from Śēkkiḻān Śelvan Chandiraśēkharan alias Śakalavichchādira Viḻupparaiyan of Tīṅgāḍupākkam alias Śōḻadivākaranallūr in Nīrvāḷūr-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭk-kōṭṭam to the image of the god Vṛishabhavāhanadēvar in the temple of the god Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyamādēvar of Kūvam mentioned above. Among the pieces of land, mention is made of one which belonged to a certain Kumāran Śivakkoḻundu Ēṟan who is stated to have paid the tax on it from the king's ninth year to the 41st year. The gift was intended to provide for worship, offerings, festivals and processions of the image of the deity, which are detailed at length. The ūravar and the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple at Kūvam had accepted the gift-land and had agreed to carry out the services accordingly. Also records a gift of poṉ received by the Śivabrāhmaṇas for burning a nandā lamp in the temple. A number of representatives of the above-mentioned groups figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻcūḻnta puṇari Akaḻcūḻn=ta puviyiṟ poṉnemiyaḷavun=tannemi naṭātti viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāṟ putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāriyyiramuṉaikkon=taḷa varaicar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali kāṭṭip porpari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit teṉṟicaittemaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum poṉṉiyāṭaiyu naṉṉilappāvaiyun=tanimaiyun=ta virappuṉita
ṟṟirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉṉaṭiyiraṇṭun=taṭamuṭiyākat toṉnilaven=tar cūṭa muṉṉai maṉuvāṟu perukakkaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai yiru nilavaḷākam veṅkaṇun=taṉātu tirunila veṇṇilātikaḻa Oru tani meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭutta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟainiṟpa vilaṅkiya teṉṉavaṉ karun=talai parun=talaittiṭattaṉ poṉ ṉakarppuṟat tiṭaikkaṭappa viṉṉāṭ piṟkulap piṟaipolamuṟ piḻaiyeṉṉuñ colleti
r koṭiṟṟallatu taṉkai villetir koṭā veḻ kulattaraicar kallatar Aḷattiyiṟpaṭṭa kaḷiṟṟinnataniṭṭamum paṭṭa vempariyuṅ keṭṭat tanmānamuṅ kūṟiya viramuṅ kiṭappa veṟinamalaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭai n=toṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷu n=talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticaittaṉṉāḷukan=ta tāṉūn=tāṉaiyum paṉṉāḷiṭṭa palapala mutukum payattetir māṟiya jayapperun=tiruvum paḻiyukantu koṭutta pukaḻiṉ celviyum vāḷeroṇ kaṉamaṭan=tayariṭṭamu miḷātu koṭutta veṅkariniraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇ
ṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇavenṉum pāṇiyiraṇṭu moru vicaikkaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅkeraḷattiru[viḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkamum poruparittaraṅ kamum poru parikkalankaḷunta n=tiravāriyumuṭaiyttāyavatu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal paṭarvatu polattan peruñcenaiyevip pañcavaraiyvarum poruta moyakaḷattañci veruvineḷittoṭiyaraṇenappukka kāṭaṟappuṭaittu nāṭṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poccai veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟa vijayastambhan=ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttiṉ calāpamu muttamiḻp potiya
lumatta veṅkaripaṭum vayaṟcayamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟallān=tanivicumpeṟa māveṟippa tan marutaniṟ talaivar kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷittiṟalkoḷ veṅkaimaṇṭalaṅ kaṭantu tāṅkalar kaliṅkameḻuṅkanaleri parappip poṅkoḷiyāramun=tiruppuyat talaṅkalumpola viramun=tiyākamum viḷaṅkappārtoḻac civaniṭattumaiyenat tiyākavalli Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Avaḷuṭan ka
ṅkai viṟṟirun=tana maṅkaiyar tilatameḻicaivallapi Eḻulakamuṭaiyāḷ vāḻi malarn=tanitiruppa vāḻiyumavanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu virasiṁhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna cakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpatteṭṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟkoṭṭattuk kanṟūr nāṭṭuk kūvamākiya maturān=takanallūr Ūrom Uṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭaiya mātevar koyilil vraṣabhavāhanadevaṟku tiruvamutu ceykaikku Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭattu nirvāḷūr nāṭṭutti

ṅkāṭupa�kkamāna coḻativākaranallūṟ cekkiḻān celvan can=tiracekaranāna cakalaviccātira viḻupparaiyan pakkal ponkoṇṭu Iṟaiyiḻiccip poliyūṭṭāka viṭṭa nilam caḷukkikāṭṭi Āticcanum kovankāṭṭiyum tampiyum Ivarkaḷ pakkal nāṅkaḷ vilaikoṇṭa nilamum kumāran civakkoḻuntu Eṟina Ittevaṟku Onpatāvatu mutal nāṟpattoṉṟāvatu varai Iṟai yiruntupona Ivanuṭaiya nilamum caḷukki maṇiyan kirttikāntuḻānapaṭṭikku māṟṟu nilam viṭṭuk koṇṭa kāntuḻānpaṭṭiyum kumutaṭi tāmotirantāḻi kāntuḻānapaṭṭiyil meṟkaṭaiyak kuḻi nāṟpat
taiñcum Uṭpaṭa Inilaṅkaḷ poliyūṭṭāka viṭuvataṟku kiḻpāṟkellai kaliya[ ntu]Read [nti] śvaramuṭaiya mahādevar tevatānam kuṟumuṭi tāḻi malaiyun=tampimārum tāmotiran tāḻiyum Iṟaiyiṟāte ponamaiyil Ivarkaḷ ṉilam kāntuḻāṉ paṭṭiyum nan=tipperuñceṟuvum Uṭpaṭat taṭi palavum patinaṟucāṇ kolāl kuḻiiraṇṭāyirattoruṉūṟṟeṇpatarai Itil tiruṉāḷ muṉṟilum cevitta Aṭiyāṟku muṭṭukaikku viṭṭakuḻi Iruṉūṟṟuttoṇṇūṟṟuṉālaraiyum cittirait tiruṉāḷ tiruviḻā Eḻun=taruḷiṉa Aṉṟu kūttā
ṭuvāṉukku viṭṭa kuḻi ṉūṟum nikkik kuḻi Āyiratteḻuṉūṟṟoṇpattāṟuṅkoṇṭu devaṟkum pirāṭṭiyāṟku malain=timuṉṟukkum IkṣavaRead iṣapa devaṟku san=ti Oṉṟum Arici patakkiruṉāḻikku nellum Aiṅkuṟuṇi Aññāḻiyum kaṟiyamutu muṉṟukkum neyyamutu tayiramutu Aṭaikkāyamutum Uppukkum viṟakukkum nelluppatakkum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aṟuṉāḻikkālāl nel Eḻukuṟuṇi Aiññāḻiyāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatukku nel Iṟuṉūṟṟirupatteṇ kalane Irutūṇiyum cittiraiṉāḷ tiruviḻāveḻun=taruḷat tirukāppu nāṇ cā
ttap puṇṇiyākam paṇṇuvārkkum Annuvar kāriyattukkum tirukkāppu nāṇ cāttavum kaḻaṭṭavum Arici kuṟuṇikku nel patakkum tirukkāppu nāṇ ceyyap poṉṉukku nelkalamum Āṟṟaikkuk kaḷiyamutu ceytaruḷukaikku Arici kalattukku nel Irukalane patakkum Innellukkuṟavum māviṭikkavum kūlikku nellut tūṇiyum pakal māvu Amutu ceytaruḷukaikku Arici tūṇikku nel Irutūṇi patakku kaṟiyamutukkum neyyamutukkum tayiramutukkum Uppukkum miḷakukkum viṟakukkum Aṭaikkāyamutukkum nellu
ttūṇi nānāḻiyum kaḷiyamutu ceytaruḷukaikku neymuḻakkum caṟkarai nāḻiyum tayiramutu Irunāḻiyum pākku muppatum veṟṟilai Eṇpatukku nellut tūṇip patakke Aiññāḻiyum tiruvācikuttat tirukkolaṅkoḷvārkku nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum tiruvārātaṉai paṇṇuvān Oruvaṉukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyum palakāram paṇṇuvār Eḻuvaṟku nellu Eḻukuṟuṇiyum śrīpātantāṅkuvār Aṟuvaṟkum nellut tūṇippatakkum tavaḷaccattira muṭpaṭṭa maṇiyeṭuppārkku nellup patakkum tiruviḷakkaimpatukku Eṇṇai paṉṉirunāḻi Urikku ne
llu nāṟkalane patakkum Eṇṇaik kuṭañ cumappānoruvanukkum Eṇṇai vārppār Iruvarukku nellu mukkuṟuṇiyum viḷakkuppiṭikkum Āḷ Oṉṟukku muṉṉāḻiyāka Āḷ Aimpatukku nellukkalane tūṇippatakkaṟu nāḻiyum tiruvolak kattukku Eṇṇai nāḻiyum kūttukku Eṇṇai Oṉpatu ṉāḻiyum Āka Eṇṇai patināḻikku nellu mukkalane kuṟuṇi Aiññāḻiyum kucavaṉukku nellu patakkum viḷakkup piṭittiṭuvāṉukku nellup patakkum Āka nellup patiṉaiṅkalane Eḻu kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyu mācittirunāḷil tiruvo
lakkañ ceytaruḷi naldevarkkum pirāṭṭiyārkkum canti Iraṇṭukku Aricitūṇi nānāḻikku nel Irutūṇimukkuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum kaṟiyamutukkum neyyamutukkum tayiramutukkum Aṭaikkāyamutukkum viṟakukkum Uppukkum miḷakukkum Ākanelluk kalane patakkirunāḻiyum vaiykācittirunāḷil tiruvolakkattukku devarkkum pirāṭṭiyārkkum pakal Iravaikkut tiruvamutukku Aricitūṇi nānāḻikkum kaṟiyamutu Uḷḷiṭṭa Avaiyiṟṟukkum Ākanellukkalane patakkirunāḻiyum Ittirunāḷil tiruviḻāvukkuc ciṟappu
viṭum Eṇṇai Aiññāḻikku nellu Irukalane mukkuṟuṇiyum Ākanellu kālāl Irunūṟṟaṟu patiṉ kalattukkum Innilam can=tirātittavaṟ deva- tānamāka viṭṭom maturān=takanallūr Ūrom Ittevar koyilil civabrāhmaṇarom Innilaṅkaikkoṇṭu Inniman=taṅkaḷ celuttak kaṭavomākavum nāṅkaḷ ponkoṇṭu poliyūṭṭākat tirunan=tāviḷakkoṉṟu Erikkak kaṭavomākavum tiruvālattiyum muṭṭā meceyyak kaṭavomānom civabrāhmaṇarom Ikko
yilil Uvaiccarom Ittevaṟkut tirunāḷilum kūttilum koṭṭavum Ūtavum nittamum can=tiracekaran=tampirāṉ van=tāneṉṟu tanikkāḷam piṭik kaṭavomākap ponkoṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka Inniman=tañ ceyyak kaṭavomānomittanmañ can=ti- rātittavarai celuttak kaṭavomānom Ivvaṉaivom Ittanmattukku Aḻivu ceyvār keṅkaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭaic ceytār ceyta pāvattaippaṭuvār .§ Ippaṭikku ku muṭinan=tikaṇavatiyāna maturān=taka viḻupparaiyan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikkuk kuṟu muṭi caṅkan An=tari Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku Iruṅkaṇūr ki
ḻavan Irācacun=taran vayiramekan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku Iruṅkaṇūr kiḻavan perayan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikkuk kumārattanacerinan=ti Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikkuk kumārattanacerinan=ti Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikkuttuppūrān kūḷanvaṭukanātan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku koṭṭaippākkiḻān veḷān pañcaneti Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku Ivvūr Ūrkkaṇakkan Ūr brāhmaṇan caṅkaranārāyaṇan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku Ivvūr kaṇakkan vaḷḷalteṭiyamāneti Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku kaucikan kaṇavatipaṭṭan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku kau
cikan civanākapaṭṭan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku kautaman cun=tarapaṭṭan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku gautaman=tampi civapaṭṭan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku kaucikan sarvadevabhaṭṭan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku kāśyapan Ātittatevapaṭṭan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku gautaman Aṅkāṭipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku vitiviṭaṅkan kūvaviṭaṅka Ācāriyan Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikkuc celva tiruvuṇāḻikai Ācāriyānneḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku vayiramekan koḻun=tin Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikkut tampi pottan Eḻuttu .§
Digital edition of SII 26.349 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
